metadata.description: SEO analysis tools for Claude Code

plugins.name: claude-seo
plugins.description: Comprehensive SEO analysis skill for Claude Code. 21 core sub-skills covering technical SEO, E-E-A-T, schema markup, image optimization, GEO/AEO, backlinks, local SEO, maps intelligence, semantic topic clustering, SXO, SEO drift monitoring, e-commerce SEO, international SEO with cultural profiles, FLOW framework integration, Google API integration, and PDF reporting.
